notes: Do not put SecretId or SecretKey in this file.
Create cloud_sync/cloud_sync_config.json from this example; it is gitignored.
Set TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_ID and TENCENTCLOUD_SECRET_KEY as user environment variables.
Provider values: disabled, mock, tencentcloud. The old command provider is kept only for legacy experiments.

legacy_command_provider_example.import_command: not recommended: CloudBase CLI 3.6.1 does not provide the required simple JSON collection import flow
